title: Alaskan Wilderness with Log Cabin - Forge Labs Recreation
description: The modpack is based on Forge Labs' Alaskan Wilderness, with an added map featuring a period-accurate log cabin for a more immersive and authentic wilderness experience.
body:
**This modpack builds on Forge Labs' Alaskan Wilderness—full credit goes to their [original project](https://modrinth.com/modpack/alaskan-wilderness).**

**This pack includes a period-accurate log cabin, providing a more authentic experience of traditional life in the wild.**

![Outside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6fc492a4cdcb65ae890ee3d6c3137882d9018a0d_0.webp)

**INTERIOR**

![Kitchen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a6d873d98c89aeaa72043d54747ba52bdaf8b139_0.webp)

![Bedroom](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c080fce65676d217a39a9ecc775abbacce2eb08_0.webp)

![Attic](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a1cb118f4985eb74f2948a2675dcaaa40d94d57d_0.webp)

![Toilet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df199c2955d7552b821883541b28cc74e7c298a4_0.webp)

**NIGHT VIEW**

![Outside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/55104d9080b7e22778486662a0a9e55613d7a4db_0.webp)

**TERRAIN**
The terrain differs from ForgeLabs' video but retains similar changing landscapes and the wide range of possibilities featured in the original.

![Terrain-1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9036d52a580fc42f2d8dfa8afa36fe241883e038_0.webp)

![Terrain-2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f6581628fb5d05b2764eed23dc0fe4d2981e34b_0.webp)

![Terrain-3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/001ea20a391716877527571c4666f1a083ad12f0_0.webp)

**WHERE TO START**
For the basics, you can follow Sean’s [video](https://youtu.be/SNIrgfPmurg) and find additional guidance in his related videos.
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/SNIrgfPmurg" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**IS THERE FUTURE FOR THE MODPACK?**
Yes, I intend to enhance and expand the mods to deliver a more authentic and immersive gameplay experience. While building on Forge Labs’ original work, I will also adapt the mods to incorporate my own unique style and vision, taking the project in new directions.
